title: Pratyaṅgirā Devī Sādhana
century: Medieval (c. 8th–14th c.) with later paddhati elaborations
description: A fierce protective Śākta rite addressed to Pratyaṅgirā (also Atharvaṇa Bhadrakālī, Narasiṃhī, Siṃhamukhī), invoked to counter hostile mantra-prayogas and "reverse" (*viprīta*) inauspicious force. High caution — advanced Śākta rite associated with the Atharvaṇa layer and with abhicāra-counter (pratyangirāṇa) practice. Preserved here as heritage / source material. Not instructional.
